name: Eleven55 Ripley
bathroomsNote: 2BR units have 2 or 2.5 baths depending on floor plan (B2.5B layout = 2.5 baths, 1,285 sq ft; other 2BR layouts = 2 baths).

notes.source: UDR property page, UDR amenities page, UDR community FAQ, ApartmentList, VeryApt resident reviews
notes.doorman: UDR FAQ states concierge is 'open 24 hours every day.' Resident reviews are mixed: some praise front desk screening, others note inconsistent enforcement.
notes.pool: Rooftop pool on Sky Deck; open 11am to 9pm daily; closed September through April; unheated.
notes.gym: Fitness center with yoga room; open 24 hours.
notes.packageRoom: Parcel Pending lockers; 24/7 resident access; $20 setup fee + $8/month.
notes.balcony: Listed as 'Patio/Balcony' unit amenity on ApartmentList; resident reviews mention private balconies with DMV views. UDR's own amenity page does not list private balconies explicitly; not available in all units.
notes.wellMaintained: Multiple resident reviews cite elevator outages (4 elevators with frequent 1+ down at a time), a multi-month roach infestation, and a long-term resident summary that 'the building has declined on everything.' VeryApt overall rating 6.3/10.
notes.pets: Cats and dogs allowed; specific weight/breed limits not confirmed from sources reviewed.
notes.unitClimate: Individual air conditioning and ceiling fans listed as in-unit amenities, indicating resident-controlled climate.
notes.transit: Adjacent to Silver Spring Metro Station (Red Line)
